channel.title: Garage Gym Gazette
channel.description: Fresh takes for home lifters building garage gyms.

item.title: The state of Racks in 2026
item.description: A field report on racks: where things stand, and what home lifters building garage gyms should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Barbells without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to barbells for home lifters building garage gyms — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "garage gym on a budget" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "garage gym on a budget" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why home lifters building garage gyms are rethinking Programming
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how home lifters building garage gyms approach programming — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Flooring on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in flooring — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Barbells: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping barbells for home lifters building garage gyms.
